title: Fix top-level interface port used in lint-only mode

features.name: interface with parameterized conditional generate block containing function
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameter and a conditional generate block containing a function whose return type uses the interface parameter
features.snippet: interface my_if #(parameter integer DW = 8)(); if (DW < 4) begin: gen_blk function automatic [DW-1:0] myfunc(); return DW; endfunction end endinterface

features.name: top-level module with unused interface port
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with an interface port that is not referenced elsewhere within the module
